title: MedsState
description: State file for the med-reminder OpenClaw skill. One file per user.

version.description: Schema version. Bump when making breaking changes.

meds.description: All tracked medications. One object per med.

timezone.description: IANA timezone string, e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles'. Required — no system inference.

quiet_hours.description: No reminders sent during this window. Times in local HH:MM (24h).

paused.description: Global pause. When true, all dispatch exits silently regardless of med state.

digest_time.description: Daily digest fires once at this local time.

delivery_channel.description: Messaging channel for outbound reminders. Swappable in future versions.

id.description: Stable unique identifier, e.g. 'med-001'. Never reused after deletion.

name.description: Human name used in messages and fuzzy matching, e.g. 'Metformin'.

dose.description: Prescribed dose amount as a string, e.g. '500', '2', '10'.

paused.description: Per-med pause. When true, dispatch skips this med only.

frequency.description: How often the med is taken. 'interval' uses interval_hours; others use times[].

times.description: Local HH:MM dose times. Required for once_daily, twice_daily, weekly. Omit for interval/as_needed.

interval_hours.description: Hours between doses. Required when frequency is 'interval'. Null otherwise.

with_food.description: Whether the med should be taken with food. Informational only — shown in digest.

notes.description: Free-text timing notes shown in the digest, e.g. 'Take with morning meal'.

late_threshold_minutes.description: Minutes past due before sending the LATE nudge. Default: 30.

missed_threshold_minutes.description: Minutes past due before logging as MISSED. Must be > late_threshold_minutes. Default: 90.

late_message.description: Message sent on LATE. Supports {name}, {dose}, {unit} template vars.

missed_message.description: Message sent on MISSED. Supports {name}, {dose}, {unit} template vars.

medState.description: Runtime state. Written only by safe-write.sh (dispatch) or the AI reply handler.

status.description: Current dose status. 'deferred' resets to 'pending' at midnight.

last_taken.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last confirmed dose. Null until first confirmation.

last_reminded.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last outbound reminder sent.

next_due.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of next scheduled dose. Set by setup-tasks.py on registration. Recomputed after each confirmation via compute_next_due().

missed_count.description: Cumulative missed dose count. Incremented on MISSED, never decremented.

history.description: Last 30 dose events. Oldest trimmed when count exceeds 30.

event.description: What happened. 'late_nudge_sent' records the nudge without confirming the dose.

dose_prescribed.description: The prescribed dose at the time of this event, e.g. '500mg'.

dose_taken.description: Actual dose taken if different from prescribed. Null means same as prescribed.

notes.description: Optional free-text note, e.g. 'took with food', 'felt nauseous'.

timeHHMM.description: 24-hour time string in HH:MM format, e.g. '08:00', '20:30'.

isoDatetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset, e.g. '2026-04-21T08:00:00-07:00'.
